summary: Iteration 7 Testing Complete - All new features working correctly. Backend: 36/36 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components tested and working.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed missing useRef import in GamesPage.js (line 1) - was causing potential runtime error in TreatCatcher game
Notifications system properly creates notifications when messages are sent
Group chat correctly validates participants and creates group conversations
All 4 games (Breed Quiz, Treat Catcher, Pet Puzzle, Pet Show) are playable with proper point scoring
File upload endpoint correctly validates file types and uploads to emergent object storage
Feed page has native file upload option for video/audio posts (in addition to URL input)
seed_data_creation: Test groups created during testing (prefixed with TEST_) - can be cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new feature sets tested and working: 1) Notifications - GET /api/notifications returns notifications with unread count, POST /api/notifications/mark-read marks all as read, notifications created when messages sent. 2) Group Chat - POST /api/chat/groups creates groups, GET /api/chat/groups lists user's groups, messages work via existing conversation endpoints. 3) New Games - treat-catcher/submit, pet-puzzle/submit, pet-show/submit all award points correctly with proper scoring formulas. 4) File Upload - POST /api/uploads/file uploads to emergent object storage, validates file types, returns file metadata. Frontend: Notification bell in sidebar shows unread count and dropdown panel, Chat widget has Direct/Groups tabs with group creation form, Games page shows all 4 games as 'Play Now', Feed page has file upload option for video/audio posts.

notifications_get.notes: Returns notifications list and unread_count, supports limit parameter

notifications_mark_read.notes: Marks all notifications as read, unread_count becomes 0

message_creates_notification.notes: Sending a message creates notification for recipient with type='message'

group_chat_create.notes: Creates group with name and participants, validates inputs

group_chat_list.notes: Returns user's groups with members, last_message, unread_count

group_messages.notes: Messages can be sent to group conversations

file_upload.notes: Uploads to emergent object storage, validates file types (image/video/audio), returns file_id and storage_path

frontend_notification_bell.notes: Bell in sidebar shows unread count badge, dropdown panel shows notifications with mark-all-read button

frontend_chat_groups_tab.notes: Chat widget has Direct and Groups tabs, New Group Chat button, group creation form with member selection

frontend_games_all_playable.notes: All 4 games show 'Play Now' buttons (no 'Coming Soon'), Treat Catcher game loads and runs correctly

frontend_feed_file_upload.notes: Video and Audio post types have 'Upload file' option in addition to URL input

existing_features.notes: Health check, auth, feed, marketplace, chat contacts/conversations, games leaderboard, breed quiz all still working
